ground_truth.title: How Much Does Pest Control Cost in New York, NY
ground_truth.main_content:
Use this free guide to calculate how much pest control services cost in New York, NY. Get prices for one-time treatment, monthly, and quarterly home pest control treatment. In New York, pest control services cost around $152 for a one-time treatment, and/or $37 for weekly services. For homeowners looking for quarterly pest control services, expect to invest around $129 per treatment. Here's what you need to know before you hire a pest control company in your area.

Types of Pest Control Services in New York: Usually, pest control for invaders such as ants, spiders, and roaches is a standard service. However, dealing with rodents or termites ups the price for treatments. Here's a list of common pest control solutions: Termites, Bedbugs, Spiders, Ants, Mosquitoes, Flies, Wasps/Bees, Roaches, And much more.

Pest Control Pricing in New York, NY: Single Treatment costs $143 – $298, First Visit costs $155 – $304, Monthly Treatment costs $45 – $71, Quarterly Treatment costs $92 – $287, Annual Treatment costs $272 – $484. *These costs are for a 1,600 – 2,000 square foot house.

Pest Control Prices by Treatment Type: Ant Control Cost $87 – $376, Termite Exterminator Cost $488 – $2,452, Tick Control Cost $176 – $452, Bed Bug Treatment Prices $289 – $668, Beehive Removal Cost $92 – $399, Mouse Exterminator Cost $77 – $245, Roach Extermination Cost $89 – $377, Squirrel Removal Fees $72 – $365, Silverfish Extermination Cost $129 – $387, Spider Removal Cost $121 – $213, Wasp Control Cost $118 – $802, Mosquito Control Prices $125 – $397.

Reliable Pest Control Companies in the Near Me: Positive Pest Control of NYC at 166 East 96th Street Suite GRC, New York, NY 10128. Broadway Pest Services at 782 Amsterdam Ave, New York, NY 10025. Organic Pest Control NYC at 342 E 87th St, New York, NY 10128. Green Earth Pest Control, Inc. at 116 W 23rd St 5th Floor, New York, NY 10011.

Weather Impacts on Pest Control: The local weather in New York has a significant impact on the type of pest control solutions homeowners deal with. In New York City, you can expect to feel the bite of wintertime temperatures as they drop below freezing and snow falls on occasional evenings. Summers are much more forgiving with highs into the upper 80s degrees Fahrenheit throughout most months.

Pest Control quotes within 25 miles of these zip codes: 10001, 10002, 10003, 10004, 10005, 10006, 10007, 10009, 10010, 10011, 10012, 10013, 10014, 10016, 10017, 10018, 10019, 10020, 10021, 10022, 10023, 10024, 10025, 10026, 10027, 10028, 10029, 10030, 10031, 10032, 10033, 10034, 10035, 10036, 10037, 10038.
